title: popstats server activator (umbrella)
description: Single entry-point schema for the popstats local server. Clients post a JSON document conforming to this schema; the dispatcher routes by the `statistic` discriminator to the appropriate per-statistic activator schema and engine.

dispatcher_contract.validate_step: JSON Schema validate against this umbrella schema; reject with HTTP 400 + the schema validation error if invalid.
dispatcher_contract.route_step: Read `statistic`; load the matching engine binding from the per-statistic activator schema's `engine_binding` block; map activator fields to CLI flags.
dispatcher_contract.execute_step: Run the engine binary; capture TSV stdout + JSON-metadata header (the '# schema_version=...' line).
dispatcher_contract.wrap_step: Build the extractor JSON from the TSV by reading the header to populate `metadata` and each row to populate one item in `windows`.
dispatcher_contract.respond_step: Return the extractor JSON. status='ok' on success, 'empty' when no windows produced (e.g. all filtered), 'error' on engine failure (with `error` field populated).
